query:
SELECT 
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid')) as principal_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid')) as interest_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid')) as fee_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid')) as penalty_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.unlock_fee_paid')) as unlock_fee_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.discount_amount')) as discount_amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.overpaid_amount')) as overpaid_amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount')) as bad_debt_amount,
  amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') > 0
LIMIT 5;

-- ดู keys ทั้งหมดใน raw_json
SELECT JSON_KEYS(raw_json) as all_keys
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365'
LIMIT 1;
